backlog.title: Set up Meta Business Suite app and get access tokens
backlog.description: Create Facebook App in Meta Developer Portal, configure Instagram Graph API, generate page access token with required permissions (pages_show_list, pages_read_engagement, pages_manage_posts, instagram_basic, instagram_content_publish)

backlog.title: Create content calendar template skill
backlog.description: Build a skill template for generating weekly/monthly content calendars with themes, posting schedule, and content mix (product spotlights, nutrition tips, engagement posts)

backlog.title: Build product spotlight generator from Square catalog
backlog.description: Implement integration with Square Catalog API to fetch product data (name, description, price, images) and generate compelling product spotlight posts

backlog.title: Create nutrition tip library from owner knowledge
backlog.description: Build a curated library of pet nutrition tips based on John's expertise with 200+ brands. Organize by category (protein, allergies, weight management, coat health, senior pets, puppies/kittens)

backlog.title: Design Instagram post templates
backlog.description: Create visual templates for consistent branding: product spotlight, nutrition tip, promotion, engagement post. Include JT Pets colors, fonts, and logo placement guidelines
